description: Letter from Avraham b. David b. Sughmār, probably in Alexandria, to his son, David, in Fustat. Dating: ca. 1055 CE. The father rebukes his son for losing money. He mentions several negative events that happened probably in the Maghreb. Also describes how his son lost trading goods as silk. He also complains about his illness (r6). Information from Gil, Kingdom, vol. 4, pp. 1-4, #609. VMR. ASE.
tags: illness: du'f, 11th c, silk, illness: marad, illness letter 969-1517, Arabic address, Illness
description_he: מכתב מאברהם בן דוד בן סוגמאר, כנראה מאלכסנדריה, לבנו דוד בפוסטאט, כ-1055: האב מוכיח את הבן על אובדן כסף ומתאר אירועים שליליים (כנראה מהמגרב), כולל אובדן סחורות משי.
